description: A text card on a plain white background framed by a thin black border with small notches at the upper-left and lower-right corners. In the top-left corner, the hashtag '#EndTrafficking' appears in blue. The central text is set in heavy bold sans-serif: 'Did You Know?' in black, followed by 'Human trafficking victims often know the person who lures them into a trafficking situation.' in bright blue. The lower-right corner carries the DHS Blue Campaign logo (a blue circular swirl) with the wordmark 'BLUE CAMPAIGN' and the line 'One Voice. One Mission. End Human Trafficking.'
notable_text: #EndTrafficking; Did You Know? Human trafficking victims often know the person who lures them into a trafficking situation.; BLUE CAMPAIGN - One Voice. One Mission. End Human Trafficking.
